title: I let Claude Code take my job (it did better than me)
summary: A content creator compared Claude Code's coding output against their own work in a practical task and found the AI model outperformed them. The video explores whether AI will replace humans across job categories, examining both successes and limitations of the tool in a real-world workflow.
